scripts.typecheck: vue-tsc --noEmit -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.web.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pi-runtime-adapter/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.pack:test:win: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64 --publish never && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec node scripts/verify-test-package.mjs win x64
scripts.pack:test:mac:arm64: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec node scripts/verify-test-package.mjs mac arm64
scripts.pack:test:mac:x64: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --x64 --publish never && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec node scripts/verify-test-package.mjs mac x64
scripts.pack:test:mac: pnpm verify && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --arm64 --x64 --publish never && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec node scripts/verify-test-package.mjs mac arm64 && pnpm --filter @deepwrite/desktop exec node scripts/verify-test-package.mjs mac x64
